changes.old: “How did Miss Cheney receive you! Did she hand over the affair to you!”
changes.new: “How Miss Cheney received you! She handed the affair over to you!”
changes.reason: Source punctuates with '!' not '?'; Allsop speaks laughing, knowingly ('among friends'). The lines are exclamatory/affirmative ('How she received you! She handed you the deal!'), not interrogative. Restores the mood. Refuted-finding re-check overturn.
